problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Transcranial. Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
